<!--
Thanks for contributing to Prismarr!

Before submitting, please make sure you've read CONTRIBUTING.md and that
`make check` passes locally. The golden rules (CONTRIBUTING.md § Absolute
golden rules) are non-negotiable.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. Link to the related issue if any. -->

Fixes # <!-- issue number, or delete if none -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires a migration plan - see CONTRIBUTING.md golden rule #3)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Definition of Done checklist

See `CONTRIBUTING.md` for the full list.

- [ ] The feature works end-to-end, tested manually in a running container
- [ ] No `console.log`, `dd()`, `var_dump`, `TODO`, `FIXME` leftover
- [ ] Comments are in English
- [ ] **Zero credentials** in code, commits, logs, or docs
- [ ] At least one unit test for new business logic
- [ ] If this is a bug fix: a regression test that reproduces the bug is included
- [ ] `make check` passes locally
- [ ] If an entity was modified: a new migration is committed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `README.md` updated if user-facing behaviour changed

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything the reviewer should know: design choices, known edge cases,
screenshots, performance considerations, etc. -->
